narrative:
Bellevue City 1-A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 916 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
